capabilities_used.evidence: 2024-12-28 明确说“ The time for alt coins is NOW going into 2025! The chart below is OTHERS/BTCUSDT ”；图4、图6 都是在看 OTHERS/BTC，相当于直接用 BTC.D/山寨相对强弱框架判断 alt season。
图5 的 BTC 周线和 RSI 下方都标了 1/2，价格更低低点而 RSI 抬高低点；图6 的 OTHERS/BTC 周线也同样标了 1/2 的 RSI 看多背离，这说明他反复用背离抓中期底部。
2024-12-26 说“ Literally all crypto based signs point to 2025 Q1 being good for altcoins ”；2025-08-28 说“ alt season. ”；整体叙事高度依赖 2025 牛市阶段和山寨季窗口。
2024-03-31 说“ we aren't even above $150k btc yet ”；2024-04-29 又说“ I will dump my bags... When Bitcoin is above $150,000-$200,000 ”，明显按 BTC 四年周期顶部区间来规划退出。
图3 的 BRETT/WETH 4h 在急跌后画出继续上行路径，典型是回调结束后的趋势延续投射；2025-05-29 说“ Couldn’t have asked for a better consolidation for $brett This next run... ”，也是把盘整看成续涨中继。
他默认把市场放在强牛趋势里：2024-07-31 说“ Time (with skill and patience) ”；2025-04-26 连续发“ last resistance level... has been cleared with ease ”、“ So much higher ”，说明其基准状态是趋势继续而非均值回归。

他对横盘/沉寂有明确行为规则：2025-07-27 说“ The silence in the space... is one of the most bullish patterns ”；2025-07-26 说“ If you don’t accept and EMBRACE quiet times, you will always be exit liquidity ”，把区间沉寂视为筹码整理阶段。
图5 BTC 周线叠加多条均线，价格重新站回并沿均线抬升是核心观察之一；他不是纯裸 K，更愿意用均线位置确认大趋势恢复。
2025-02-28 在大跌后说“ for any fallen soldiers that got setback badly in this dip ”；图5、图6 都是在 RSI 低位背离后寻找反弹/反转，属于超卖后转强的同一思路。
2024-04-30 说“ The market is getting as many ppl out of their positions now before we go higher ”，把下杀理解为清洗弱手/扫流动性，而非新一轮趋势性崩跌。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Ecosystem Leader Relative Strength
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 生态龙头相对强度比较
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Rank tokens by market cap, draw pairwise comparisons against sector leaders, and build a thesis that the category leader in one ecosystem will eventually flip peers in other ecosystems.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 通过市值排名和同赛道龙头横向对比，建立“某生态第一龙头最终翻转其他生态龙头”的结构性交易假设。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 多次用 BRETT 对比 WIF/FLOKI/BONK/DOGE/SHIB；图7 直接贴 WIF 与 BRETT 市值排名；2024-11-30 说“ First we flip Floki, then we snatch the hat ”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Airdrop Liquidity Reflexive Bid
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 空投流动性反身性抬价
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Anticipate that a large ecosystem token launch or airdrop injects fresh liquidity that reflexively rotates into the top memecoin of that ecosystem before and after the event.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 预判大型生态代币发行或空投会注入新增流动性，并在事件前后反身性流向该生态头部 meme 币。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-05-31 说“ If BASE drops a token = mega bullish for $BRETT ”；2025-09-30 说“ massive pump once everyone gets their airdrop and 25-40% of that BASE airdrop flows into BRETT ”；图8 用 Base net flows 做辅助。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Boredom Accumulation Window
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Treat silent, frustrating, low-attention periods after drawdowns or long consolidations as the highest expectancy accumulation window before a large move.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把下跌后或长时间盘整后的沉寂、无聊、低关注阶段视为大行情前胜率最高的吸筹窗口。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-07-27 说“ The silence in the space... is one of the most bullish patterns ”；2025-07-26 说“ EMBRACE quiet times ”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Market Cap Ladder Targeting
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Project upside by mapping the asset to prior category winners and estimating sequential market cap flips instead of using only chart-measured moves.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用历史同类龙头的市值区间和逐级超越路径来推导目标，而不是只靠传统量度涨幅。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 反复说“ flip BONK and FLOKI ”、“ 40B-80B market cap this cycle ”、“ $BRETT at 2B today is better than $DOGE at 5B in 2021 ”。

personal_quirks.quote: Buy when shit looks and feels bad  so u can sell when things look and feel good
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 情绪和价格体验最差时逆向吸筹，情绪最顺时兑现。

personal_quirks.quote: I rather be all in and under water 10-20% temporarily   Than to be 50% in, half out, and buying as we “confirm” higher
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 宁可提前重仓承受浅套，也不愿等待确认后被迫追高。

personal_quirks.quote: If you don’t accept and EMBRACE quiet times, you will always be exit liquidity and buying tops in exciting times
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 无聊横盘期才是建立大仓位的地方；只在兴奋期行动的人会成为接盘者。

personal_quirks.quote: The coins that u feel little TO ZERO stress holding  These are good coins
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 主观持有舒适度和叙事确定性，是他筛选重仓标的的重要标准。

personal_quirks.quote: When in doubt, always bull it out
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 默认偏多，除非有非常强的反证；犹豫时倾向保持牛市立场。

unique_traits: 他不像传统 TA 交易员那样强调复杂形态和严格风控，而是把简单 TA 工具（RSI 背离、均线、通道、相对强弱）和极强的叙事/生态龙头信仰结合起来。其核心优势不是精细择时，而是高杠杆化的长期叙事持有、对山寨季与生态轮动的强烈信念，以及用内容传播把“共识形成”本身当成交易边的一部分。
